compose_diagnostics.page_title: Brian Allen on X: "🚨Karoline Leavitt says Iran has now gifted the US 30 oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz. Zero evidence any tankers have been transferred. Zero confirmation from CENTCOM. Zero confirmation from Lloyd’s of London. Zero confirmation from any shipping company. Zero confirmation https://t.co/1EybRpXvqe" / X
compose_diagnostics.compose_text_preview: I've been watching the claims about Iran gifting oil tankers. CENTCOM and Lloyd's data don't back it up. When public statements don't align with verifiable sources, it erodes trust. Specific, named sources are crucial for public discourse.
